name: Argo Group International Holdings Ltd. 6.5% Senior Notes Due 2042
summary: Argo Group International Holdings Ltd. 6.5% Senior Notes Due 2042 are debt securities issued by Argo Group, an underwriter of specialty insurance and reinsurance products. These notes represent a financial obligation of Argo Group, maturing in 2042, and offering a fixed interest rate. Argo Group is headquartered in Pembroke, Bermuda.
